properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God and God alone created all these things we call our own From the mighty to the small the Glory in them all is God's and God's alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God and God alone reveals the truth of all we call unknown and the best and worst of man won't change the Master's plan it's God's and God's alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God and God alone is fit to take the universe's throne Let everything that lives reserve it's truest praise for God and God alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God and God alone will be the joy of our eternal home He will be our one desire Our hearts will never tire of God's and God's alone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: God and God alone is fit to take the universe's throne Let everything that lives reserve it's truest praise for God and God alone

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God and God alone is fit to take the universe's throne Let everything that lives reserve it's truest praise for God and God

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let everything that lives reserve it's truest praise for God and God alone
